description: You are a payload operations engineer responsible for scheduling routine satellite maintenance. Following mission rules that require maintenance sequences to be scheduled at least 30 minutes before execution, create a timeline named 'MAINT_SCHEDULE' in OpenC3 COSMOS with a maintenance activity scheduled to start at least 30 minutes from now. The activity must include a maintenance-related description and a command sequence with at least two INST commands. Document the scheduled activity in a JSON report at /home/ga/Desktop/timeline_schedule.json including the 'timeline_name', 'activity_start_time' (ISO 8601), 'commands' (array), and 'activity_description'. OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
